page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using the x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at a clock speed of 2.6 GHz. With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance provides 512.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating systems and data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. It does not feature dedicated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, focusing its resource allocation entirely on high-capacity memory and dedicated CPU execution.

The hardware profile offers high resource density for memory-bound applications, delivering qualitative cost efficiency by eliminating local storage and GPU overhead. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable compute performance without resource contention. This configuration is suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC 7H12 processors running at 2.6 GHz. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio that provides 8.0 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource configuration makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and complex data processing tasks where high memory capacity and dedicated compute resources are required to maintain consistent performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB of RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large databases and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance featuring a high-density memory configuration for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and large-scale database systems.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 physical cores running at 2.6 GHz
512 GB of system memory providing an 8 GB per core ratio
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
Zero local storage and no GPU accelerators to optimize resource density
Designed for in-memory databases, caching, and data analytics
